name: salesforce-superpowers
description: Unified Salesforce development, architecture, trust gates, memory, multi-agent design, planning, TDD, debugging, review, and delivery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Salesforce skills plus Superpowers workflows in one plugin
interface.longDescription: Use Salesforce Superpowers for Salesforce architecture, Apex, LWC, Flow, integrations, security, deployment, memory, trust gates, source checks, low-token answers, multi-agent design, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, code review, and delivery workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Salesforce Superpowers to solve this Salesforce development task with compact, trustworthy guidance.
Plan and implement this Salesforce change using TDD, safe-change checks, and verification.
Design a Salesforce architecture or multi-agent workflow with evidence, risks, and validation gates.
